text:
For
calculating
mode
and
median
for
grouped
data,
it:
should
be
ensured
that
the class
intervals
are
e continuous
before
applying
the
formulae. Same
condition
also
apply
for
construction
of
an
Ogive.
Further, in
1 case of ogives, the scale
may
t be the
same on
both the
not
axes.
